title: Natural Language to Reproducible Pandas Code
subtitle: A data agent is useful only if its natural-language answer leaves behind executable, inspectable code.
summary: The Data Cleaning Assistant turns plain-English CSV cleaning requests into reproducible pandas scripts and cleaned outputs.

artifact.title: From request to transformations
artifact.description: Toggle common transformations to see how raw columns become model-ready features or cleaned fields.

contentBlocks.text: A user says, 'make hired a boolean, remove bad rows, and graph followers against following.' The agent has to infer columns, data types, missing-value rules, output expectations, and whether a change should mutate the file or create a derived column.

contentBlocks.content:
A robust data-cleaning agent should produce three things:

1. **A cleaned dataset** the user can download.
2. **A script** that can reproduce the transformation.
3. **A short audit trail** explaining assumptions and rows affected.

sections.heading: Reproducibility as the Product
body: The script is not a side effect; it is the trust object. A cleaned CSV without code is hard to audit and hard to reuse when the source file changes.
Generated code should be small, dependency-light, and deterministic. It should avoid hidden state, random mutation, and ambiguous column guessing when the schema is unclear.

sections.heading: Execution Safety
body: Running generated code needs guardrails: whitelisted imports, file sandboxing, timeouts, memory limits, and clear separation between code generation and execution.
The user should be able to inspect the code before trusting the output, and the system should show shape changes, null counts, and modified columns after execution.

rows: Preview schema and ask or infer conservatively
Work on a copy and keep original available
Whitelist imports and block arbitrary system calls

pitfalls: Returning a verbal answer without code.
Using inplace mutations that make debugging harder.
Conflating data cleaning with statistical modeling.
Letting generated code access the network or filesystem broadly.

quiz.question: Why should the agent export the pandas script?
options: So the transformation can be audited and rerun
quiz.explanation: The script is the reproducible record of the cleaning operation.
